name: MessageReplacer
author: Bluscream (bluscream_)
short: Deletes and reposts messages via webhooks using random profiles.
description: Deletes messages by configured users or all other users, and reposts them to the same channel with a random profile (name/avatar) loaded from CSV/TXT or added directly.
install_msg: MessageReplacer installed! Set it up using `[p]messagereplacer`.
